data.body:
[Event Update Notice]

The "Special Mission Decagrammaton" Event Story is back!
Shall we dig into the truth behind the Decagrammaton with Himari?

🗓️Period: 5/16(Tue) 2:00 AM ~ 5/30(Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)
